RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING
INCOME AND EXPENSE DECLARATION FILED BY RESPONDENT HORTON JR, FRANK E

AFTER ARGUMENT & SUBMISSION, AND PURSUANT TO DISSOMASTER CALCULATIONS, THE COURT ORDERED FATHER TO PAY MOTHER CS IN THE AMOUNT OF $70.00 PER MONTH AND TEMPORARY S/S IN THE AMOUNT OF $306.00 PER MONTH, FOR A TOTAL OF $376.00 PER MONTH, RETROACTIVE TO APRIL 1, 2002. ADDITIONALLY, FATHER SHALL PAY MOTHER $315.00 IN SUPPORT FOR THE MONTH OF MARCH, 2002. S/S SHALL BE TAXABLE AS TO MOTHER & DEDUCTIBLE AS TO FATHER. FATHER WAS PLACED UNDER OATH & TESTIFIED.
APPLICATION AND DECLARATION FOR ORDER (DOMESTIC VIOLENCE) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED HORTON, MARIA FRANCESCA AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED HORTON JR, FRANK E
CONTINUED TO APR-03-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 404
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE (RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING, RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING CONTINUING HEARING DATE) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED HORTON, MARIA FRANCESCA
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: MANETAS, PETER MICHAEL SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR HORTON, MARIA FRANCESCA

ON THE ISSUE OF THE R/O, AFTER TESTIMONY BY FATHER, ARGUMENT & SUBMISSION BY COUNSEL, AND GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT ISSUED A STANDARD NINE MONTH R/O WITH FATHER TO STAY 100 YARDS AWAY FROM MOTHER, HER RESIDENCE AND MOTHER'S PLACE OF EMPLOYMENT. MOTHER MAY RECORD ANY PROHIBITED COMMUNICATIONS BY RESPONDENT. FIREARM RESTRICTION/RELINQUISHMENT SATISFIED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY RONALD SINCLAIR, CSR #1170.
